lines.gurmukhi: ਲੇਵੈ ਦੇਵੈ ਢਿਲ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: levai devai dtil na paaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Taking away and giving back, God does not delay. ||1||Pause||
As is their awareness, so is their way.
According to the account of our actions, we come and go in reincarnation. ||1||
Why, O soul, do you try such clever tricks?
All beings belong to You; all beings are Yours. O Lord and Master,
how can You become angry with them?
Even if You, O Lord and Master, become angry with them,
When one's actions are right, the understanding is perfect.
We are foul-mouthed; we spoil everything with our foul words.
You weigh us in the balance of Your Glance of Grace.
still, You are theirs, and they are Yours. ||2||
Without good deeds, it becomes more and more deficient. ||3||
Prays Nanak, what is the nature of the spiritual people?
They are self-realized; they understand God.
such spiritual people are honored in His Court. ||4||30||
By Guru's Grace, they contemplate Him;
Siree Raag, First Mehl, Fourth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਜਹ ਦੇਖਾ ਤਹ ਤਹ ਤੂ ਹੈ ਤੁਝ ਤੇ ਨਿਕਸੀ ਫੂਟਿ ਮਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jeh jeh dekhaa teh teh too hai tujh te nikasee foott maraa |1|
lines.english: Wherever I look, You are there. Outside of You, I would burst and die. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਦਰੀਆਉ ਦਾਨਾ ਬੀਨਾ ਮੈ ਮਛੁਲੀ ਕੈਸੇ ਅੰਤੁ ਲਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: too dareeaau daanaa beenaa mai machhulee kaise ant lahaa |
lines.english: You are the River, All-knowing and All-seeing. I am just a fish-how can I find Your limit?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨ ਜਾਣਾ ਮੇਉ ਨ ਜਾਣਾ ਜਾਲੀ ॥
lines.translit: n jaanaa meo na jaanaa jaalee |
lines.english: I do not know of the fisherman, and I do not know of the net.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਲਾਗੈ ਤਾ ਤੁਝੈ ਸਮਾਲੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaa dukh laagai taa tujhai samaalee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: But when the pain comes, then I call upon You. ||1||Pause||
I have not worked for You, or Your Name. ||2||
You are present everywhere. I had thought that You were far away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਛੁ ਕਰੀ ਸੁ ਤੇਰੈ ਹਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jo kachh karee su terai hadoor |
lines.english: Whatever I do, I do in Your Presence.
You see all my actions, and yet I deny them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਆ ਦਰੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੈ ਦਰਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: biaa dar naahee kai dar jaau |
lines.english: There is no other door-unto which door should I go?
Whatever You give me, that is what I eat.
Nanak offers this one prayer:
this body and soul are totally Yours. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਨੇੜੈ ਦੂਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਆਪੇ ਮੰਝਿ ਮਿਆਨੋੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape nerrai door aape hee aape manjh miaano |
lines.english: He Himself is near, and He Himself is far away; He Himself is in-between.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਵੇਖੈ ਸੁਣੇ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਕਰੇ ਜਹਾਨੋੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape vekhai sune aape hee kudarat kare jahaano |
lines.english: He Himself beholds, and He Himself listens. By His Creative Power, He created the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਸੋਈ ਪਰਵਾਨੋੁ ॥੪॥੩੧॥
lines.translit: jo tis bhaavai naanakaa hukam soee paravaano |4|31|
lines.english: Whatever pleases Him, O Nanak-that Command is acceptable. ||4||31||
Siree Raag, First Mehl, Fourth House:
As it pleases Him, He may give, or not give.
Why should the created beings feel pride in their minds?
The Gift is in the Hands of the Great Giver.
What can be done by the order of the created beings? ||1||
The spiritually blind are unripe and imperfect, inferior and worthless. ||1||Pause||
The One who owns the trees of the forest and the plants of the garden
He Himself is True; Truth is pleasing to His Will.
The wall of the body is temporary, as is the soul-mason within it.
As we plant, so we harvest and eat. ||2||
according to their nature, He gives them all their names.
The Flower and the Fruit of the Lord's Love are obtained by pre-ordained destiny.
The flavor of the intellect is bland and insipid without the Salt.
O Nanak, as He wills, He makes things right.
Without the Name, no one is approved. ||3||32||
Siree Raag, First Mehl, Fifth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਛਲ ਛਲਾਈ ਨਹ ਛਲੈ ਨਹ ਘਾਉ ਕਟਾਰਾ ਕਰਿ ਸਕੈ ॥
lines.translit: achhal chhalaaee neh chhalai neh ghaau kattaaraa kar sakai |
lines.english: The Undeceiveable is not deceived by deception. He cannot be wounded by any dagger.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਰਾਖੈ ਤਿਉ ਰਹੈ ਇਸੁ ਲੋਭੀ ਕਾ ਜੀਉ ਟਲ ਪਲੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jiau saahib raakhai tiau rahai is lobhee kaa jeeo ttal palai |1|
lines.english: As our Lord and Master keeps us, so do we exist. The soul of this greedy person is tossed this way and that. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਤੇਲ ਦੀਵਾ ਕਿਉ ਜਲੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bin tel deevaa kiau jalai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the oil, how can the lamp be lit? ||1||Pause||
Let the reading of your prayer book be the oil,
And let the Fear of God be the wick for the lamp of this body.
Use this oil to light this lamp.
Light this lamp with the understanding of Truth. ||2||
you shall find peace, doing seva (selfless service).
This body is softened with the Word of the Guru's Bani;

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਤਉ ਮਿਲੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar chaanan saahib tau milai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Light it, and meet your Lord and Master. ||1||Pause||
